content:
🚀 pluGET | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating the process of updating plugins and server software for Minecraft servers to save time and ensure all components are up-to-date.
✨ Key Features: • Automated plugin and server software updates • Local and remote server management (SFTP/FTP) • Support for Spigot, Modrinth, and GitHub plugin sources • Updates for PaperMC, Purpur, Waterfall, and Velocity server software • Console-based operation with command line arguments
📖 Summary: pluGET is a Python-based package manager designed to automate the updating of plugins and server software for Minecraft servers. It supports local and remote server management via SFTP/FTP, integrating with APIs from Spigot, Modrinth, and GitHub to simplify plugin and server software maintenance.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
